title: cyperus planifolius f. humilior
intro: Cyperus planifolius f. humilior, also known as Dwarf Papyrus, is a form of the Cyperus planifolius plant, a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus planifolius f. humilior include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
